habitat: Upper Amazon of Ecuador, Peru, Colombia; cultivated by Kichwa communities.
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional morning stimulant tea of Amazonian cultures; caffeine-containing holly like yerba mate.
traditionalUsesDe: Traditioneller morgendlicher Anregungstee amazonischer Kulturen; koffeinhaltige Ilex-Art.
cautions: Caffeine content—limit if sensitive. Hot beverage temperature cautions similar to mate.
historicalNotes: Sacred dawn drink in Kichwa tradition of the Ecuadorian Amazon.
